description: Style NoteLinos Perros' sought after contemporary cool is epitomised in this leatherette belt - guaranteed to add a finishing polish to the simplest springtime ensembles. Cinch it around your waist or hips (to suit your outfit's silhouette) and match it with tonal jewellery. Product DetailsSlim black leatherette belt, tang clasp and a fixed loop mounted on a steel buckle and holes to customise the Fit Material and CareLeatheretteWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust SizeLength: 42 cm
